revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Template disambiguation]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Template disambiguation]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing templates from wikipedia
1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT

Protected "[[Template:Template disambiguation]]": [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|High-risk template or module]]: 258 transclusions ([[User:MusikBot II/TemplateProtector|more info]]) ([Edit=Require autoconfirmed or confirmed access] (indefinite))
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

Protected "[[Template:Template disambiguation]]": [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|High-risk template or module]]: 258 transclusions ([[User:MusikBot II/TemplateProtector|more info]]) ([Edit=Require autoconfirmed or confirmed access] (indefinite))
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23626449376|time triggered pipeline]]
1 revision imported: trying to do a last fix of these, they will be fixed and not bloat the site
